'''''Jedi Guardians''''' was the fifth expansion card pack made for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]] produced by [[Wizards of the Coast]], based on the film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], though also containing elements from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] and [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] material set during this timeframe. The Expansion icon was that of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

The expansion was released in [[July 7]], [[2003]]<ref name="rel" /> and contains 105 cards including 35 rare,35 uncommon and 35 common cards.

==Gameplay==
New abilities:
*'''Overkill''' - Hits in excess of the defending unit's health may be allocated to another unit in the same arena.
*'''Reserves''' - Actions that can be performed while the unit is still in your build zone.
